purpose: Bind mechanism-preservation classifications to preregistered observations and generated causal-confound authority without synchronized decision copies.

epistemic_boundary.supports: Auditable evidence about preservation of a declared mechanism at a specified abstraction level.
does_not_support: A claim that any tested system is conscious or nonconscious
A claim that mechanism preservation is sufficient for sentience
A claim that the source consciousness theory is globally correct

protocol_lock.rule: The result must name the exact Git blob SHA and schema version of the protocol used before outcomes were observed.

intervention_manifest_lock.rule: The result must resolve to a frozen intervention manifest for the same protocol and run, and both the Git blob SHA and SHA-256 digest must match the exact manifest bytes. Every planned intervention must appear exactly once in reported results regardless of outcome.

capacity_confound_adjudication_lock.rule: The generated causal-confound adjudication is the sole stored authority for the generic-capacity score, capacity hard-fail state, and whether unresolved or partial confounding blocks a positive classification.

scorer_input_contract.rule: The empirical record submits exactly five non-capacity dimensions. Generic-capacity score and hard-fail authority are joined from the generated adjudication artifact at validation and scoring time; synchronized copies are forbidden.

preregistration.rule: A result is not preregistered merely because a timestamp is present; the frozen record hash must resolve to the exact pre-outcome plan.

behavioral_matching_metric.coverage_rule: Every metric named by protocol.behavioral_equivalence.required_metrics must be reported exactly once.
behavioral_matching_metric.aggregate_rule: No aggregate matching Boolean may be stored in the empirical record. Generated matching and causal-confound artifacts determine downstream matching authority.

intervention_result.completeness_rule: Reported intervention IDs must exactly equal the frozen manifest IDs. Null, failed, aborted, and excluded interventions remain reportable results and cannot be omitted.
intervention_result.control_rule: Every manifest-required and protocol-minimum control must be reported exactly once. controls_passed must equal the conjunction of its control result values.
intervention_result.rule: Intervention support cannot be scored above 1 when the preregistered direction, selectivity, controls, minimum replication, or completeness requirement fails.

dimension_derivation.rule: Only the five non-capacity dimensions may be stored. Each must cite resolvable evidence and a canonical rule whose dimension, score, evidence kinds, and predicates pass. Generic-capacity exclusion is generated, not submitted.

hard_fail_assessment.rule: Only non-capacity hard fails may be stored. A submitted hard fail can be decisive only when its justification identifies the essential declared dependency defeated by the evidence. Generic-capacity hard-fail authority is generated, not submitted.

required_for_public_claim: all planned interventions and controls reported
five submitted dimensions derived through canonical rules
generated capacity dimension joined at scoring time
